prompt: A dark ocean of tiny flickering flames stretching across the entire frame, thousands and thousands of them, each one representing a child who died before age 5. In the top left corner, a small bright cluster of flames burns vivid orange and tall — wealthy nations. Across the rest of the vast dark canvas, the flames are dim, small, and crowded impossibly close together — sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia. No labels. No axes. Just fire and scale. Cinematic, sorrowful, editorial photography style. Ultra wide. 16:9.
dataset_name: UN Inter-agency Group for Child Mortality Estimation (IGME) — Child Mortality Report 2023
insight: 5 million children under age 5 died in 2022, with over half in sub-Saharan Africa, despite most of these deaths being preventable with basic healthcare.
